title: T2.1: Auth WSGI integration tests — TestAuthIntegrationWSGI using webtest.TestApp. 5+ tests proving auth blocks data leakage. Files: server/tests/test_server.py [fix-cycle-2, auth, test]

text: Acceptance: (1) At least 5 WSGI integration tests using webtest.TestApp wrapping real QuotaServer._app. (2) Tests: valid key→200 with data, wrong key→401 no data, missing key→401 no data, /health→200 always, no auth configured→200, empty key→200. (3) All existing 292+ tests pass. (4) 401 responses proven to contain zero quota data (no utilization, no org_uuid).
